A small follow-up to the v4.1 recovery work: the recovery kit is now a complete standalone-restore package.

## Changed

- **The encryption-key recovery kit now includes your off-site repository credentials** when they're defined in BombVault — the rest-server username/password, S3 access keys, and the full rclone config — alongside the env-var names restic reads them from. Together with the master key, derived restic password, and repo locations it already carried, the kit now holds everything needed to reach and restore a remote repository without BombVault. Only credentials that are actually set are written, and (like the master key) they go only into the downloaded kit, never into logs. (#26, thanks @manilx)

---
